seoTitle: How to Make a 2x6 Banner in Canva Easily (2026)
metaDescription: Design a 2x6 banner in Canva for trade shows, events, or promotions, with tips on templates, text, graphics, and export-ready printing.
intro: Banners are a practical marketing tool for trade shows, exhibitions, and event promotions, and Canva makes creating a 2x6 banner approachable even for first-time designers. This guide covers choosing a template, adding text and graphics, and preparing your banner for printing.

steps.heading: Select a 2x6 banner template
steps.body: Start with a template sized to 2x6 dimensions, giving you a ready structure to build your design on.

steps.heading: Customize your banner design
steps.body: Adjust colors, layout, and background to match your event or promotional theme.

steps.heading: Add text and graphics
steps.body: Include your key messaging along with supporting graphics to make the banner eye-catching and clear.

steps.heading: Export and print your banner
steps.body: Once finished, export your design in a print-ready format suitable for your banner printer of choice.

steps.heading: Use Canva's tools to speed up your process
steps.body: Take advantage of Canva's time-saving features and AI-driven design tips to finish your banner efficiently.

faq.question: How long does it take to design a 2x6 banner in Canva?
faq.answer: Using a template, the process typically takes just a few minutes to complete.

faq.question: Can beginners design a professional-looking banner in Canva?
faq.answer: Yes, Canva's user-friendly interface is built to help beginners produce professional-quality banners without prior design experience.

faq.question: What is a 2x6 banner typically used for?
faq.answer: This size is commonly used for trade shows, exhibitions, and promotional events where visibility matters.

faq.question: How do I make sure my banner prints correctly?
faq.answer: Follow Canva's export and printing guidance to ensure your file meets the size and resolution requirements for your printer.
